summary: Verified all 6 requested UI changes for professional GPS navigation design: 1) Route polyline with 3 layers (pink glow, dark border, pink inner), 2) White triangular user marker with blue pulse ring, 3) NavigationHUD with pink theme and absolute positioning, 4) Bottom trip bar with pink accent colors, 5) CSS navPulse animation, 6) E2E test - guest login and navigation view loads successfully with map and weather overlay.

issues: Duration/Time stat still uses gold (#D4AF37) - appears intentional as it was not in the change requirements

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 1229-1236 - Route polyline has 3 layers: outer glow (#E259AD, width=28, opacity=0.18), dark border (#1a1a2e, width=16, opacity=0.9), inner route (#E259AD, width=10, opacity=1)
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 1403-1410 - User marker uses white polygon fill, drop-shadow with rgba(255,255,255,0.5), and navPulse animation with rgba(66,133,244,0.25) radial gradient
VERIFIED: index.css lines 45-49 - @keyframes navPulse animation exists with scale 0.8 -> 1.6 -> 0.8 and opacity transitions

VERIFIED: NavigationHUD.tsx - Absolute positioning (z-3100, top calc with safe-area-inset-top, left 0.75rem), bg-[#1a1a2e]/92 panel, w-12 h-12 direction icons, 2xl distance font, #E259AD pink highlight for 'immediate' detail level
VERIFIED: NavigationHUD.tsx lines 144-176 - LaneArrow component uses #E259AD for active lanes, LaneRibbon uses bg-[#E259AD]/15 and ring-[#E259AD]/30 for active lane styling
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 6897 - Distance stat uses text-[#E259AD]
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 6934 - ETA pulse dot uses bg-[#E259AD]
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 6937 - LIVE label uses text-[#E259AD]/70
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 6924 - Waypoint count uses text-[#E259AD]

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 6 requested changes verified via code review and E2E testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 UI changes verified: 1) Route polyline uses 3-layer design with pink (#E259AD) glow and inner line, dark border (#1a1a2e), 2) User marker is white triangular chevron with blue pulse ring animation, 3) NavigationHUD has absolute positioning with pink theme for immediate maneuvers, 4) Bottom trip bar uses pink accent for Distance, ETA pulse, LIVE label, and waypoint count, 5) CSS navPulse keyframes animation exists, 6) E2E test confirms guest login works and navigation view loads with map and weather overlay. Note: Duration/Time stat intentionally kept as gold (#D4AF37) - not in change requirements.

route_polyline.details: 3 polyline layers verified: outer glow (#E259AD, width=28, opacity=0.18), dark border (#1a1a2e, width=16, opacity=0.9), inner route (#E259AD, width=10, opacity=1)

user_marker.details: White polygon fill, drop-shadow with rgba(255,255,255,0.5), navPulse animation with rgba(66,133,244,0.25) radial gradient

navigation_hud.details: Absolute positioning (z-3100, top calc with safe-area-inset-top, left 0.75rem), bg-[#1a1a2e]/92 panel, w-12 h-12 icons, 2xl distance font, #E259AD pink highlight

bottom_trip_bar.details: Distance uses text-[#E259AD], ETA pulse uses bg-[#E259AD], LIVE label uses text-[#E259AD]/70, waypoint count uses text-[#E259AD]

css_pulse_animation.details: @keyframes navPulse exists with scale 0.8 -> 1.6 -> 0.8 and opacity transitions

e2e_navigation_view.details: Guest login works, navigation view loads with map container and weather overlay visible

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked (403 error) - TTS falls back to native browser speech synthesis. Non-blocking.
